def negative_repeated_path_exists_check_before_open_or_replace_in_loop():
    rule_id = "repeated_path_exists_check_before_open_or_replace_in_loop"
    family = "hot_path_ext"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag loops that perform a separate existence check before every file operation."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
